Computer Science Engineering student at SRM University AP, focused on artificial intelligence, systems programming, and technical communication. Synthesizing complex engineering concepts into accessible solutions.

>_ ABOUT

LOCATIONAMARAVATI, IN
ROLEAI SPECIALIST
TEMP72°F CLEAR

RISING AI SPECIALIST REVOLUTIONIZES TECH INDUSTRY

Ramratan Padhy has maintained an exceptional academic record while actively engaging in advanced research and practical applications. His portfolio of work spans from developing complex Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines to mathematical modeling of drone trajectories.

He has consistently demonstrated the ability to synthesize complex engineering concepts into accessible solutions, working effectively in both research and startup environments.

"This interface is a zero-dependency, single-file brutalist artifact… optimized for AEO crawlers and instant edge delivery."

TECHNICAL CHRONICLES

VOL. 1, NO. 1
PROJECT_01

ARGUS

PYTHON GEMMA 4 IoT SIM

Simulated a drone swarm that collectively maps any terrain using Gemma 4 31B vision via Cerebras. Engineered autonomous agent drones sharing a collective memory that aggregates into a unified semantic map displayed on a CesiumJS 3D globe.

→ VIEW DISPATCH
PROJECT_02

AXtheR

C WIN32 API CRYPTOGRAPHY

Zero-dependency UDP VPN for Windows using Wintun kernel driver. ChaCha20-Poly1305 cryptographic engine from scratch with zero-heap allocation data path and asynchronous I/O.

→ VIEW DISPATCH
PROJECT_03

GRAND TRIBUNAL

NEMOTRON GRADIO VOICECPM

Ace Attorney-style turn-based AI debate game utilizing voice input. Two specialized Nemotron models serve as dynamic opponents and logical judges through a custom Gradio frontend.

→ VIEW DISPATCH
READ FULL ARTICLE
